citizens.name: Gleam
citizens.material: Matte Vinyl with glazed ceramic trim
citizens.bodyColors: Citizen white body, ocean teal accent trim at waist
citizens.clothing: Thin fjord-blue collar wrap at waist seam only
citizens.accessories: Tiny lighthouse stub on 7 head (Slot A)
citizens.imagePrompt: Professional museum product photography of a premium matte vinyl designer collectible toy. THE67 Genesis Citizen 000013. Body formed entirely by cute inflated digits 6 and 7 SIDE BY SIDE as one unified mascot — 6 is left round belly digit with circular hole, 7 is right diagonal digit, connected at soft waist seam. Citizen white matte vinyl body with subtle ocean teal glazed ceramic trim at waist collar only. FOUR tiny black dot eyes only — two dots on 6 upper curve, two dots on 7 top bar. NO mouth NO nose NO human face. Short rounded capsule arms and legs. One tiny minimalist lighthouse stub on 7 head only. Still upright neutral stance. Front three-quarter view, centered full figure. Pure black studio background. Soft museum gallery product lighting, subtle matte highlights. High-end designer art toy aesthetic. One figure only. Square 1:1 composition.
